title: Half a Heart!
description: This Plugin adds a new command used mainly for scripted servers that make u stop taking damage at half a heart, YES the animation and damage visual effects will still play, but no damage?!
body:
half a heart is a plugin mainly used for scripted servers, the plugin adds:
Prevents players from subtracting hp when on 0.5 hearts (half a heart).

Commands:


**/half** : adds a person that will be affected.

**/unhalf** removes a person that was affected.
